[[Count/Legends|Count]] '''Rial Pernon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] noble from [[Eiattu 6]] who served on the [[Priamsta]]. He was the cousin of [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]], and was engaged to his daughter, [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]], in their youth as part of an arranged marriage. When Plourr returned to Eiattu, Rial was her staunchest supporter. He flew a modified [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].
